title: pelargonium spirans
intro: Pelargonium spirans, also known as the Cape geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Pelargonium spirans include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and providing antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of the plant, which can be taken as teas, tinctures, or infusions, are commonly used to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
